category_sources: Official NetHack site and source repository describe NetHack as the game project.
display_name_sources: Official nethack.org and GitHub organization use NetHack capitalization.
docs_sources: Official nethack.org hosts the NetHack 5.0.0 Guidebook PDF.
repo_sources: Official nethack.org Git bootstrap page lists https://github.com/NetHack/NetHack.git; GitHub organization describes NetHack/NetHack as the official NetHack Git repository.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repo was determined from official sources.
